Transfer Learning to CCSD(T): Accurate Anharmonic Frequencies from Machine Learning Models

Authors: Silvan Kaeser, Eric Boittier, Meenu Upadhyay, Marky Meuwly

Journal: Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation (2021)

DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.1c00249
